zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Giles Winterhay於1507年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特時，他的父親William Winterhay27歲，母親Goodwife Bennett22歲。他和Lady Isabella Jane Cockerham至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1577年在英國英格蘭多瑟特福洛 瓦其享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特。

nameMeanings.name: Giles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Much altered English vernacular form of the Late Latin name Aegidius, from Greek Aigidios (a derivative of aigidion ‘kid, young goat’), via Old French Gide. It was the name of an 8th‐century saint who, according to tradition, was an Athenian citizen who fled to Provence because he could not cope with the fame and adulation caused by his power to work miracles, in particular by healing the lame and crippled. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages and its use seems to have been confined to certain families and localities.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Giles Winterhay was born in 1507, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Winterhay, was 27 and his mother, Goodwife Bennett, was 22. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Lady Isabella Jane Cockerham. He died in 1577, in Frome Vauchurch, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Giles Winterhay est né en 1507, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Winterhay, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Goodwife Bennett, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Lady Isabella Jane Cockerham. Il est décédé en 1577, à Frome Vauchurch, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Frome Vauchurch, Dorset, England, United: Frome Vauchurch, Dorset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Giles Winterhay 1507 in Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Winterhay 27 und seine Mutter Goodwife Bennett 22. Er hatte mit Lady Isabella Jane Cockerham mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1577 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Frome Vauchurch, Dorset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Lady Isabella Jane Cockerham. Morì nel 1577, nel Frome Vauchurch, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Giles Winterhayが1507年にイギリスイギリスドールセトで生まれた時，父William Winterhayは27歳，母Goodwife Bennettは22歳であった。彼はLady Isabella Jane Cockerhamとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1577年にイギリスイギリスドールセトフロメ ヴァウチャーチで70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Giles Winterhay(이)가 1507년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Winterhay(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Goodwife Bennett(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Lady Isabella Jane Cockerham(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1577년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 프롬 바c후르치에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Giles Winterhay родился в 1507 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Winterhay было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Goodwife Bennett, 22. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Lady Isabella Jane Cockerham. Он умер в 1577 г. в местности фром ваучурч, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.
